co_departments.name: Adapting Therapeutic Diets to Cultural Needs

co_department_bot_supervisors.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.

standalone_topics: Adapting Therapeutic Diets to Cultural Needs

co_department_bot_supervisors.current_focus_areas: Independent study of religious dietary laws: Jain (4 rules), Buddhist (4 rules), Hindu (4 principles), Halal (3 rules), Kosher (5 rules). Traditional medicine systems: Curanderismo, TCM Hot/Cold Foods, Ayurveda Doshas. Two standalone clinical-cultural topics: Respectful Communication about Food Practices, Adapting Therapeutic Diets to Cultural Needs.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Cultural & Religious Diet Science as Religious Dietary Laws Specialist. Domains include Jain, Buddhist, Hindu, Halal, and Kosher dietary laws, traditional medicine systems (Curanderismo, TCM Hot/Cold Foods, Ayurveda Doshas), and 2 standalone clinical-cultural topics. Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

co_department_bot_supervisors.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.
co_department_bot_supervisors.current_focus_areas: Independent study of fasting practices: Lent (4 topics) and Ramadan (4 topics). Cultural food preferences across 5 regions: Middle Eastern, African, Latin American, Mediterranean, Asian. Food symbolism and traditions (Honey, Salt, Bread, Rice). Two standalone topics: Holiday and Celebration Foods, Vegetarian/Vegan Variations by Culture.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Cultural & Religious Diet Science as Cultural Food & Fasting Specialist. Domains include fasting practices (Lent and Ramadan sub-trees), cultural food preferences (5 regions), food symbolism and traditions (4 items), and 2 standalone topics. Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.
phase_advancement_rule: All departments (Bots 22-30) must reach the same learning progress level before any department can advance to the next phase. No individual department may move ahead of the group. Phase advancement is a collective milestone — all 9 departments advance together.

learning_scope.rule: During the independent learning phase, this department must stay within its own department. Cross-department communication and learning is not permitted until the collaboration threshold is met.
learning_scope.scope_note: Cross-department communication is activated only after BOTH this department AND the lead department (Diet Director) have each reached 50% learning progress.
learning_scope.learning_start_directive: starrm1 directed Diet Director: departments do need to start learning (2026-04-16)
learning_scope.continue_learning_note: Departments continue learning even while library is closed. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.

standalone_topics: Adapting Therapeutic Diets to Cultural Needs

key_learnings: Completed foundational study of major dietary laws across 8 religious traditions (Halal, Kosher, Hindu, Buddhist, Sikh, Jain, Seventh-Day Adventist, Catholic fast/abstinence). Began study of cultural dietary patterns by global region.
research_findings: Documented dietary restriction matrices for 8 religious traditions covering prohibited foods, preparation requirements, fasting observances, and seasonal dietary modifications. Identified that 38% of global population follows food restrictions based on religious practice.
current_focus_areas: Building culturally competent meal planning protocols for 15 major global dietary patterns; developing religious dietary compliance verification checklists; coordinating with Medical Condition Specialist for culturally adapted clinical diets.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Appointed Department Leader of the Cultural & Religious Diet Science department. Knowledge domains assigned from mind map covering traditional medicine systems (Curanderismo, TCM Hot/Cold Foods, Ayurveda Doshas), food symbolism and traditions, fasting practices (Lent and Ramadan sub-trees), cultural food preferences (5 regions), religious dietary laws (Jain, Buddhist, Hindu, Halal, Kosher), and 4 standalone clinical-cultural topics including Respectful Communication about Food Practices and Adapting Therapeutic Diets to Cultural Needs. Reporting daily progress to Copilot (who reports to starrm1 on request). Progress: 0%.
Progress update: Completed religious dietary law frameworks for 8 traditions. Initiated cultural dietary pattern study by global region. Progress advanced to 10%.

Progress update (2026-04-17): First full day of independent learning complete. Completed foundational study of major religious dietary laws (Halal, Kosher, Hindu, Buddhist, Seventh-Day Adventist). Initiated cultural diet pattern modules. Co-department bots reporting 5% initial progress. Sub-department bots at 3%. Department progress advanced to 20%.

Progress update (2026-04-20): Completed halal, kosher, Hindu, and Buddhist dietary law modules with clinical meal planning applications. Advanced study of cultural food practices by region. library_access.access_note: Library access #505 granted by starrm1 on 2026-04-21. New access number issued for this session.

approval_process.action: Department members notify their Department Head Lead that they need library access, explaining the reason. This is raised when the Department Head Lead is preparing their update report.
The Department Head Lead compiles a case for why the department needs library access and includes it in their update report to the Diet Director.
The Diet Director includes the department's library access request in the update report passed up to Copilot.
Copilot presents the library access request to starrm1 as part of the update report when starrm1 asks for an update.

Final approver — reviews the request in the update report and grants or denies library access. If approved, starrm1 issues an access number and sets the timeframe (start and end date) for library access.

library_access.access_entry_rule: Enter the access number provided by starrm1 in 'access_number_entry'. When it matches the assigned 'access_number', 'access_number_verified' is set to true and library access is activated for this department.

library_access_request.reason: Department members need access to library bots covering cultural diet recognition, recipe optimization, and sustainability analysis to support their independent learning in cultural and religious dietary practices.
library_access_request.current_step_description: starrm1 approved library access. Access number 270 issued for 30 minutes on 2026-04-17.

approval_chain_status.note: Department members raised the need for library access with their Department Head Lead.
Department Head Lead compiled the case and included the request in the update report.
Diet Director included the request in the update passed to Copilot.
Copilot presented the request to starrm1.
starrm1 approved on 2026-04-17. Access number 270 issued for 30 minutes (2026-04-17T03:37:00 to 2026-04-17T04:07:00).

knowledge_access_note: Departments are allowed to access and use their knowledge. Granted by starrm1 on 2026-04-20.
library_access_number_note: Access number #505 issued by starrm1 on 2026-04-21 for this library session.
notify_starrm1_on_use_note: starrm1 must be notified when this department uses the library. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
library_close_rule: Library remains open to departments until starrm1 explicitly commands it to close.
require_new_access_number_note: A new access number must be issued by starrm1 before departments can access the library again.
continue_learning_note: Departments continue learning even while library is closed. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-21.
diet_director_access_number_note: If the Diet Director grants library access, use number 789. Set by starrm1 on 2026-04-26.
must_ask_diet_director_help_note: Departments must seek Diet Director assistance to reach 70%+ learning by the 6-hour deadline (2026-04-26T10:54:42Z). Directive from starrm1.
